title: K: The Unknown
writer: Louis D. Lighton, Hope Loring, Mary Roberts Rinehart
actors: Virginia Valli, Percy Marmont, Margarita Fischer
plot: Sidney Page is a beautiful young nurse, the object of the romantic attentions of several young men in her small town. One of them, a mysterious fellow known as K, suddenly finds that the life of his rival for Sidney's hand depends...
